Name: CHR_WET_ASPECT_PARAM
Description: Controls the visual wetness appearance of a character, including specular response, Fresnel behavior, and color tinting used to simulate moisture effects.

Fields.Name: Wet Tint: Red
Fields.Description: Red channel of the wet surface tint color.

Fields.Name: Wet Tint: Green
Fields.Description: Green channel of the wet surface tint color.

Fields.Name: Wet Tint: Blue
Fields.Description: Blue channel of the wet surface tint color.

Fields.Name: Wet Tint: Alpha
Fields.Description: Opacity of the wet surface tint effect.

Fields.Name: Specular Override
Fields.Description: Overrides the base specular intensity for wet surface rendering (controls shininess strength).

Fields.Name: Specular Override Strength
Fields.Description: Blending ratio determining how strongly the specular override affects the final result.

Fields.Name: Fresnel Override
Fields.Description: Overrides Fresnel reflection intensity used for edge-based wet highlights.

Fields.Name: Fresnel Override Strength
Fields.Description: Blending ratio controlling how strongly the Fresnel override is applied.
